name: Cheese Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the grated cheddar cheese, unsalted butter, and salt.
2. Add the whole wheat flour and mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Roll the mixture into small balls.
4. Place the balls on an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Flatten the balls slightly with your hands or a fork.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 5 to 8 minutes, or until the edges turn light golden brown but do not brown further.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely. These crisps taste great warm or cold.
